name: Mysterious Magic Fun Fun Pharmacy
original_name: ふしぎ魔法ファンファンファーマシィー
overview: Young Popuri has just moved to a new town and is eager to discover all of the nearby stores, but little did she know that right next door would be a very special kind of shop: a magical pharmacy, run by the mysterious Fukiko-san! Popuri is dying to become a witch and learn powerful magic, and with the help of the kind Fukiko-san, she may just be able to fulfill her dream!

trailers.title: ふしぎ魔法ファンファンファーマシィー（Fushigi Mahou Fun Fun Pharmacy）OP
